title: Front Office Manager - Massive Restaurants - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Massive Restaurants - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants:
Massive Restaurants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
